sources.observed: Built In terms prohibit bots, spiders, scrapers, web crawlers, indexing agents, and other automated mechanisms. Robots rules do not override that prohibition.
sources.disposition: Legacy scheduled HTML access is disabled.

sources.observed: Dice terms require prior written authorization for unapproved automated retrieval, and robots rules disallow the exact query-based jobs path used by the legacy adapter.
sources.disposition: Legacy scheduled HTML access is disabled. The separate official Dice MCP endpoint requires a new reviewed schema, privacy, and pacing contract before use.

sources.observed: SimplyHired identifies itself as part of the Indeed Site. Current Indeed terms apply to simplyhired.com and prohibit automated access or extraction without express written permission.
sources.disposition: Legacy scheduled search-page access is disabled.

sources.observed: Glassdoor terms prohibit automated agents and scraping, stripping, or mining without express written permission. The legacy uncredentialed HTML path is not an approved API integration.
sources.disposition: Legacy scheduled HTML access is disabled.

local_policy.data_use: No scheduled provider contact while disabled.

change_triggers: The provider publishes an exact authorized third-party endpoint and use contract.
The provider supplies express written permission.
Terms, robots rules, endpoint identity, or ownership changes.
